TH_YOUMU-RIGHT_SWORD.title: Roukanken
TH_YOUMU-RIGHT_SWORD.description: At the start of combat, choose up to [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Exhaust[/gold], then gain [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Combo[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-RIGHT_SWORD.flavor: The Konpaku family's heirloom short sword, capable of cutting through human hesitation.
TH_YOUMU-LEFT_SWORD.title: Hakurouken
TH_YOUMU-LEFT_SWORD.description:
Upon pickup, if you have [gold]Roukanken[/gold], replace it with [gold]Roukanken & Hakurouken[/gold].
The first time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card each combat, deal its damage to all enemies an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
TH_YOUMU-LEFT_SWORD.flavor: A long sword forged by youkai, said to be able to cut through almost anything.
TH_YOUMU-TWO_SWORD.title: Roukanken & Hakurouken
TH_YOUMU-TWO_SWORD.description:
The first time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card each turn, deal its damage to all enemies an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
At the start of your turn, choose up to [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
At the start of combat, gain [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Combo[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-TWO_SWORD.flavor: Two swords combined, invincible under heaven!
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_POWER.title: Will of the Cherry Blossom
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, shuffle [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sakura[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_POWER.flavor: A branch of the Saigyou Ayakashi, still holding the thoughts of the dead.
TH_YOUMU-CHAIR.title: Food Stall Chair
TH_YOUMU-CHAIR.description: Positive effects you gain from cards are doubled.
TH_YOUMU-CHAIR.flavor: For some reason, you feel this chair is very powerful. Looking at it always makes you want to sing.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SOUL_TAILSMAN.title: Half-Phantom Talisman
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SOUL_TAILSMAN.description: The first time you would be affected by a debuff each turn, negate it.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SOUL_TAILSMAN.flavor: A mysterious talisman from the Netherworld that keeps the mind clear.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_BARRIER.title: Sakura Barrier
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_BARRIER.description: Single instances of damage you take cannot exceed [blue]9[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_BARRIER.flavor: A sturdy barrier that won't break even when hit by danmaku and pressing X.
TH_YOUMU-BLACK_SOCK.title: Black Knee Socks
TH_YOUMU-BLACK_SOCK.description: [gold]Combo[/gold] now only grants [gold]Stiffness[/gold] when at [blue]2[/blue] or higher.
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_MOONCAKE.title: Phantom Mooncake
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_MOONCAKE.description: At the end of your turn, if you played a card with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_MOONCAKE.flavor: Youmu's special snow-skin mooncake. I wonder if it has the texture of a half-phantom?
TH_YOUMU-LYCORIS.title: Lycoris
TH_YOUMU-LYCORIS.description: Whenever an enemy dies, increase your Max HP by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-LYCORIS.flavor: It is said to be the flower that grows only on the banks of the Sanzu River in the Netherworld, guiding the dead.
TH_YOUMU-SOUL_LANTERN.title: Soul Lantern
TH_YOUMU-SOUL_LANTERN.description: At the start of your turn, reduce this relic's count by [blue]1[/blue], then gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]1[/blue] card. When a [blue]Normal[/blue]/[red]Elite[/red]/[purple]Boss[/purple] enemy dies, increase the count by [blue]1[/blue]/[red]3[/red]/[purple]5[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-SOUL_LANTERN.flavor: A lantern that attracts wandering souls, then burns them for light.
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE.title: Mind's Eye
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE.description: Increase damage dealt to enemies with debuffs by [blue]50%[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE.flavor: A talisman from the Netherworld; using it in battle reveals the enemy's weaknesses.
TH_YOUMU-MIRROR.title: Mirror of the Underworld
TH_YOUMU-MIRROR.flavor: The mirror reflects the boundary between the living and the dead. When the mind is still as water, all can be perceived.
TH_YOUMU-LIGHTSABER.title: Lightsaber
TH_YOUMU-LIGHTSABER.description:
[gold]Right-click[/gold] this relic to toggle its effect.
You no longer deal damage. Instead, effects that would deal damage now make the enemy lose HP equal to [blue]150%[/blue] of the original base value.
TH_YOUMU-LIGHTSABER.flavor: Said to be a new weapon made on the Moon; it makes a "vroom" sound when swung.
TH_YOUMU-PREPARED_HALF_SOUL.title: Spare Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-PREPARED_HALF_SOUL.description:
Whenever you lose HP, gain [gold]Block[/gold] next turn equal to half the HP lost.
If you have [gold]Half of a Half-Phantom[/gold], this relic's effect is doubled.
TH_YOUMU-PREPARED_HALF_SOUL.flavor: One of the works of that mysterious Market God. This card preserves Youmu's ability, summoning a second phantom. Can be used together with Half of a Half-Phantom to truly resemble Youmu.
TH_YOUMU-EVADE_CLOTH.title: Evasion Cloth
TH_YOUMU-EVADE_CLOTH.description: When you would lose HP, there is a [blue]30%[/blue] chance to not lose it.
TH_YOUMU-EVADE_CLOTH.flavor: Covering your body can dodge danmaku attacks; the principle is unknown.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_SOUL.title: Half of a Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_SOUL.description:
Whenever you deal damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, make the enemy lose an additional [blue]25%[/blue] of that damage.
If you have [gold]Spare Half-Phantom[/gold], this relic's effect is doubled.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_SOUL.flavor: This is not half of Youmu, but half of a half-phantom – i.e., one quarter. Generally, being possessed by a ghost isn't a good thing, but if it helps with attacks, it's barely reliable.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA.title: Saigyou Ayakashi Petal
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA.description: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Demise[/gold] to a random enemy.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA.flavor: A petal fallen from the cherry blossom tree, carrying a hint of death.
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.title: Bunbunmaru Newspaper
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.description: At the start of combat, add 1 random [gold]Colorless[/gold] card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.flavor: A newspaper written from Aya Shameimaru's collected material. Since it is produced by one person, the content is naturally biased.
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.title: Hina Kagiyama
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.description: Whenever you draw a [red]Curse[/red], [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it, draw 1 card, and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.flavor: Hina Kagiyama now travels with you.
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.title: Kuchikamizake
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.description:
[gold]Right-click[/gold] this relic during your turn to immediately gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}.
When you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], restore 1 use.
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.flavor: Sanae's personally brewed chewing wine. A truly premium 'import,' right?
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.title: P Point
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.description:
Your [gold]Strike[/gold] cards deal [blue]{Percent}[/blue]% more damage.
[gold]Right-click[/gold] this relic to spend 1 count and deal 10 damage to all enemies.
Gain 1/2/3 count when a Normal/Elite/Boss enemy dies; halve the count whenever you lose HP. Max 5.
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.flavor: A power-up item that raises your firepower as enemies fall, but losing HP also drains it away.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.title: Broken Yatagarasu Mirror
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.description: At the start of your turn, add 1 random [gold]Kanako[/gold] card to your [gold]hand[/gold], then apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to each enemy that does not intend to attack.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.flavor: Kanako's sacred mirror lies shattered. Moriya is left with only Suwako.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.title: Damaged Iron Ring
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card that costs 1 or less, play it 1 additional time.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.flavor: Suwako's iron ring is corroded and broken. Only Kanako remains in Moriya.
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.title: Complete Moriya Shrine
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.description:
Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, play it 1 additional time.
At the start of your turn, add 2 random [gold]Kanako[/gold] cards to your [gold]hand[/gold]. They cost 0 this turn. Then apply 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to each enemy that does not intend to attack.
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.flavor: Sanae stopped the conflict between the two gods, and Moriya's pair of deities remained together. This too is another history.
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.title: Safe Return Frog Talisman
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.description: At the start of combat, gain 10 [gold]Once Armour[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.flavor: A popular Moriya Shrine charm from Suwako. Carry it and you'll return home safely.
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.title: Snake-Skin Talisman
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.description:
At the start of combat, gain 8 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
At the start of each of your turns after the first, gain 4 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.flavor: A charm from Kanako Yasaka. It is said to keep the bearer strong and healthy.
TH_SANAE-BAND_AID.title: Wind Priestess Bandage
TH_SANAE-BAND_AID.flavor: A bandage blessed by Moriya Shrine, said to possess remarkable healing power.
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.title: Secret Book of Moriya
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.description: Your [gold]Chant[/gold] cards need 2 fewer turns to complete. Whenever you [gold]Chant[/gold], gain 2 random [gold]Strength[/gold] or [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.flavor: A record of Moriya's inherited arts, including secret techniques lost from oral transmission.
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.title: Changed Timeline
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.description: At the start of your turn, discard up to [blue]{Count}[/blue] cards, then return the same number of cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.flavor: Something seems to have changed in the unseen flow of fate...
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.selectionScre: Choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards to discard.
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.returnSelecti: Choose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards to return to your hand.
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.title: Flowing Hina Doll
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.description: [gold]Right-click[/gold] this relic to release the hina doll, removing all [red]Curses[/red] from your deck and [gold]Exhausting[/gold] all [red]Curses[/red] and [gold]Status[/gold] cards in combat.
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.flavor: Set the hina doll afloat down the river, and your misfortune will drift away with it. That is the Hina Festival.
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.title: Ashes of the Hina Doll
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.description: This relic has exhausted its power... but perhaps it still has some other use?
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.flavor: After absorbing your misfortune, it burned brightly and left behind only this small pile of ash.
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.title: Essence of a Living God
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.description:
At the start of your turn, each [gold]Devotee[/gold] makes you gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Persuade[/gold] all enemies; if there are no [gold]Devotees[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.flavor: For a god, losing faith means losing power, and gaining faith means the opposite.
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.title: Wind God Girl
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Wind[/gold], gain twice that amount instead.
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.flavor: Aya Shameimaru now travels with you.
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.title: A Certain Goddess's Weird T-Shirt
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 1 [gold]Frail[/gold], then gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.flavor: Sanae, once you let go of pointless shame, you become truly powerful. - Hecatia
